title: Glass Noodle Salad

instruction.title: 1. Cook the Glass Noodles
steps: Soak the noodles in warm water for 5–7 minutes until soft, or boil for 2–3 minutes.
Drain and rinse under cold water.
Toss with sesame oil to prevent sticking.

instruction.title: 2. Prepare Vegetables and Protein
steps: Julienne cucumber, carrot, and red bell pepper.
Slice spring onions and blanch bean sprouts if using.

instruction.title: 3. Make the Dressing
steps: Whisk together soy sauce, rice vinegar, sugar, sesame oil, neutral oil, garlic, ginger, and chili oil.

instruction.title: 4. Assemble the Salad
steps: Combine noodles, vegetables, and protein in a large bowl.
Pour dressing over and toss gently to coat evenly.

instruction.title: 5. Garnish and Serve
steps: Sprinkle sesame seeds, herbs, and peanuts on top.

chefTips: Glass noodles should be firm but slippery, not mushy.
Rinse noodles with cold water after cooking.
Toss noodles with sesame oil to prevent sticking.
Balance savory, sweet, tangy, and spicy flavors carefully.
For best texture, serve immediately after dressing.
